subcodes.first_line: The Book hath indeed been sent down in truth for such as have believed in God, the Lord of all worlds. It proclaimeth: There is none other God but I, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین ینطق انه لا اله الا انا العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @purpose; goal of creation
